user.title: Configure brrr.now
user.description: Enter your brrr.now API key and set optional notification defaults.

data_description.sound: Sound played with every notification. Leave empty for the system default.
data_description.interruption_level: iOS interruption level for every notification. Leave empty to use the app default.
data_description.subtitle: Secondary line shown below the title in every notification.
data_description.open_url: URL opened when the notification is tapped.
